overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking along a mountain trail in a post-apocalyptic wilderness setting. The character traverses rocky terrain under overcast skies, passing abandoned vehicles and power lines while snow-capped mountains loom in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with rocky cliff formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt hillside path with a rifle strapped to his back

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff formation with layered sedimentary rock visible ahead on the path
evergreen pine trees dotting the hillside to the right of the trail
valley below covered in dense forest stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dry hillside trail with rocky cliff formations ahead. Sparse pine trees dot the right side of the path while a forested valley drops away to the left. The overcast sky provides diffuse lighting over the rugged terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: ridge trail with expansive mountain vista

events.description: snow-capped mountains become visible in the distance as the character rounds the bend

agents.ego_description: continuing along the ridge trail with expansive mountain views opening up to the left

entered.detail: distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible beyond the valley

segments.scene_description: As the character rounds the bend along the ridge, snow-capped mountains come into view in the distance to the left. The rocky cliff formation moves to the left side of the frame while the trail continues along the hillside with pine forests visible on the right.

events.description: abandoned vehicles come into view along the trail

agents.ego_description: approaching abandoned vehicles parked along the mountainside trail

entered.detail: yellow diamond-shaped warning sign indicating a curve in the road ahead
derelict green sport utility vehicle parked on the right side of the trail
abandoned blue pickup truck with visible wear and dirt
rusted red pickup truck parked further along the trail

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a section of trail with abandoned vehicles including a green SUV and two pickup trucks. A yellow road sign stands near the path while snow-capped mountains remain visible in the background. The rocky cliffs from earlier segments have passed out of view.

events.description: character passes the abandoned vehicles and continues along the trail

agents.ego_description: walking past the abandoned vehicles and continuing along the hillside trail alongside power lines

entered.detail: weathered wooden utility poles with power lines running parallel to the trail

segments.scene_description: Having passed the abandoned vehicles, the character continues along the trail with wooden power poles and lines running parallel on the left. The path winds along the mountainside with expansive views of the snow-capped peaks and forested valleys in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged hillside trail that gradually opens up to reveal a vast, post-apocalyptic mountain vista. It begins with the character traversing a dry path between rocky cliff formations and a steep forested valley under a diffuse, overcast sky. As the character rounds a bend along the ridge, the cliffs shift to the left and the horizon expands to reveal distant snow-capped mountains looming over the landscape. The scene then transitions toward a cluster of abandoned vehicles, including a green SUV and pickup trucks beside a yellow road sign, as the initial rocky formations fade from view. Finally, the camera follows the character past the wreckage and along a line of wooden power poles, winding further along the mountainside to overlook expansive forested valleys and frozen peaks.
